definition:
1. of every kind, of all sorts, manifold , (Homeric Hymns), etc.:—;in plural, πολλοὶ καὶ π. (Herdotus Historicus):—;adverb -πῶς, in all kinds of ways , Poeta quoted in (Aristotle Philosopher) 
2. παντοδαπὸς γίγνεται, = παντοῖος γίγνεται, assumes every shape , (Aristophanes Comicus) (ML)
